items.prompt: Я чувствую гордость за свою семью.
items.answer: I feel pride for my family.
alt_answers: I am proud of my family.

items.prompt: Ему было стыдно за свои слова.
items.answer: He was ashamed of his words.
The boredom in class was terrible.
I felt strong fright.
alt_answers: I felt a strong scare.

items.answer: She has anxiety before the exam.

items.prompt: У него осталась обида на брата.
items.answer: He still has a grudge against his brother.
alt_answers: He still feels resentment toward his brother.

items.answer: Envy is a bad feeling.
alt_answers: Jealousy is a bad feeling.

items.answer: I felt pity for the dog.
alt_answers: I felt sorry for the dog.

items.answer: His indifference surprises me.
Music gives me inspiration.
After the walk I found calm.
alt_answers: After the walk I found calmness.

items.answer: Mom has worry because of the weather.
alt_answers: Mom is worried because of the weather.

items.prompt: У меня большой стресс на работе.
items.answer: I have a lot of stress at work.
alt_answers: I have big stress at work.

items.answer: Depression is a serious problem.

items.prompt: Дети были в восторге от подарка.
items.answer: The children were delighted with the gift.
alt_answers: The kids were excited about the gift.

items.answer: I watched the film with horror.
The child has great curiosity.
Thank you for your sympathy.
alt_answers: Thanks for your compassion.

items.answer: I have longing for home.
alt_answers: I am homesick.

items.answer: There was malice in his voice.
alt_answers: There was spite in his voice.

items.answer: I heard loud laughter.
Her crying woke everyone up.
She has a very beautiful smile.
There was a tear on her cheek.
He has high sensitivity.

items.prompt: Не нужно волноваться, всё будет хорошо.
items.answer: No need to worry, everything will be fine.
alt_answers: Don't worry, everything will be okay.

items.answer: I am starting to be nervous before the meeting.
alt_answers: I am getting nervous before the meeting.

items.answer: Don't be angry with me.
alt_answers: Don't get angry at me.

items.answer: He often gets angry without a reason.
alt_answers: He often gets mad for no reason.

items.answer: She takes offense at every word.
alt_answers: She gets hurt by every word.

items.answer: The children are shy to speak loudly.
Mom always worries about the children.
The cat gets scared of loud sounds.
I hope that you will come.
He hates cold weather.
I admire her talent.

items.prompt: Я жалею, что не пошёл с вами.
items.answer: I regret that I did not go with you.
Friends sympathize with my grief.
He constantly complains about work.
Grandmother sighs quietly.
The scared child cried for a long time.
alt_answers: The frightened child cried for a long time.

items.prompt: Удивлённый гость не знал, что сказать.
items.answer: The surprised guest did not know what to say.
The offended friend went home.
alt_answers: The hurt friend went home.

items.answer: I am a very happy person.
He had a sad voice.
alt_answers: His voice was sad.

items.answer: The teacher is pleased with my answer.
alt_answers: The teacher is satisfied with my answer.

items.answer: Dad is displeased with my grades.
alt_answers: Dad is unhappy with my grades.

items.answer: She came home upset.
alt_answers: She came home distressed.

items.answer: The young man in love bought flowers.
The disappointed viewer left the concert.
